subject: GRB 050520: OSN optical observations
editedBy: Judith Racusin at NASA/GSFC <judith.racusin@nasa.gov> on behalf of Leo P. Singer at NASA/GSFC <leo.p.singer@nasa.gov>
body:
A. de Ugarte Postigo, A. J. Castro-Tirado, A. Sota,
M. Jelínek, J. Gorosabel and S. Guziy (IAA-CSIC Granada) 

report:

"Following the detection by INTEGRAL of GRB 050520 
(Gotz et al. GCN Circ. 3430), we have taken images 
in the VRI bands with the 1.5m telescope at IAA's  
Observatorio de Sierra Nevada, starting at 00:39 UT
(i.e. 30 minutes after the event).  The co-add of 
the first three I-band frames (3 x 300 s exposure 
time) reveals no optical counterpart in the 1.5' 
radius error box down to the DSS2 limiting magnitude. 
Further analysis is ongoing."

This message can be quoted.
